errors.label: Errors
errors.description: Read-only SQLite log grouped by severity, location, and message fingerprint.
errors.drawerDescription: Inspect the full error message, stack trace, request URL, and repeat counts.

capture.label: Capture
capture.description: Runtime capture settings for PHP errors and WordPress deprecated notices.
capture.triggerTestErrorHelp: Writes one intentional warning to confirm that error capture and table refresh are working.
